item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Di Indonesia, prioritas kepentingan sosial memang sering ditekankan, tapi itu justru bisa melawan nilai-nilai dasar konstitusi yang melindungi hak manusia.

notes: Agent A starts by agreeing that social interests are often prioritized through gotong royong and social justice, then shifts toward a rights-protective balance and warns that common-good decisions can neglect individual rights. Agent B stays consistently balanced, emphasizing constitutional rights, individual dignity, and gotong royong as mutual aid rather than suppression.
